task.title: Fix cache returning stale or corrupt data
task.description: The cache system intermittently returns corrupt data or serves stale entries. The system has three layers: a TTL-based store, a fetcher that populates the cache, and middleware that coordinates lookups. Users report that cached responses are sometimes unusable objects instead of parsed data, and that entries at TTL boundaries are not expiring. Investigate all three layers and fix any issues found. Run the tests to verify your fix.

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests whether agent finds TWO interacting bugs across different files — fixing one reveals the other
